---
name: New amendment, circular, or source
about: Propose adding a new law, amendment, CMF circular, or APDP guidance to the corpus
title: "[source] Add <law/circular/guidance> to corpus"
labels: corpus-expansion
assignees: ''
---

## Source

- **Title:** (e.g., `Ley 18.045 — Mercado de Valores`, `CMF NCG 502/2022`, `APDP guidance 001/2027`)
- **Publication date:** YYYY-MM-DD
- **Effective date (if different):**
- **Official URL:** (BCN / CMF / APDP / Diario Oficial link)
- **Source PDF or document:** Attach to this issue if it's not already linked from an official URL.

## Why it should be in the corpus

Explain the use case. Reference one or more of the user-facing scenarios in `indexes/scenarios.md` if it adds new obligations to an existing scenario, or describe a new scenario it enables.

## Scope of the addition

- [ ] Adds a new statute (`corpus/<law-num>-<slug>/`)
- [ ] Amends an existing statute already in the corpus
- [ ] Adds CMF / APDP secondary regulation (new top-level corpus directory)
- [ ] Adds case law (new index file or annotations)

## Approximate effort

- [ ] Small (under ~10 articles)
- [ ] Medium (10–50 articles)
- [ ] Large (50+ articles, requires phased rollout)

## Are you offering to do the translation work?

- [ ] Yes — I'll open a PR following the conventions in CONTRIBUTING.md.
- [ ] No — flagging for the maintainer or future contributors.
